name: riskScore
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Audit risk model AR = IR x CR x DR: inherentRisk = mean(likelihood*impact); overallControlRisk = 1 - product(effectiveness); detectionRisk = 1 - mean(effectiveness). Result card renders flat auditRisk/riskLevel/overallControlRisk/detectionRisk/inherentRisk + controls[].{id,name,adjustedEffectiveness,controlRisk,observedEffectiveness} EXACTLY (the prior nested components{} + controlResults were NOT what the flat card read; fixed 2026-06-28; the nested components{} + controlResults are retained for parity + provenance — controls is an alias of controlResults). Fail-CLOSED numerics: prob() = Number()+Number.isFinite+clamp[0,1], so 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' fall to 0 (parseFloat would have leaked Infinity -> NaN auditRisk, or silently accepted the '12abc' prefix as 12). riskLevel = bayesianAdjustedRisk >=0.6 high / >=0.3 medium / else low.
